headline: Refiner Margins Surge as Oil & Gas Sector Diverges: VLO, MPC, PSX Lead
summary: Downstream refiners like Valero, Marathon, and Phillips 66 are outperforming the struggling oil & gas sector, driven by surging margins and explosive earnings growth.
